samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>Implement a frequency divider that divides the input clock frequency of 100MHz signal, and the outputs are 3 clock frequencies: 50MHz, 10MHz, 1MHz.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal.</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="CLK_in">CLK_in</parameter>
        <parameter id="RST">RST</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_50">CLK_50</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_10">CLK_10</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_1">CLK_1</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <description>Reset the counter cnt_100 to 0 when the reset signal RST is active.</description>
            <signal id="RST" type="combinational_logic"/>
            <signal id="cnt_100" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[6:0]"/>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <description>Toggle the output clock signal CLK_1 when the counter cnt_100 reaches a value of 49.</description>
            <condition>
                <signal id="cnt_100" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[6:0]"/>
                <operator>==</operator>
                <constant>49</constant>
            </condition>
            <description>Reset the counter cnt_100 to 0 when the counter cnt_100 reaches a value of 49.</description>
            <signal id="cnt_100" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[6:0]"/>
            <signal id="CLK_1" type="combinational_logic"/>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Reset the counter cnt_100 to 0 when the reset signal RST is active. Toggle the output clock signal CLK_1 when the counter cnt_100 reaches a value of 49. Reset the counter cnt_100 to 0 when the counter cnt_100 reaches a value of 49. Reset the counter cnt_100 to 0 when the reset signal RST is active. Toggle the output clock signal CLK_1 when the counter cnt_100 reaches a value of 49.</implementation>
</module>
